title: Detailed Quote Workflow
subtitle: Full operational flow including approvals, delivery, invoicing, versions, and draft deletion rules
purpose: Feed this JSON into Google Gemini to generate a polished workflow diagram that shows the complete current quote workflow.

nodes.label: Draft Quote
nodes.description: Initial working quote. Editable.

nodes.label: Submit for Approval
nodes.description: Moves the latest draft into internal approval.

nodes.label: Pending Approval
nodes.description: Awaiting internal review.

nodes.label: Changes Requested
nodes.description: Approver has requested amendments.

nodes.label: Update Quote
nodes.description: Quote is edited and resubmitted.

nodes.label: Approved and Sent to Customer
nodes.description: Quote email is sent to the customer. This sets the quote to Sent.

nodes.label: Sent
nodes.description: Customer-facing quote has been issued.

nodes.label: PO Number Can Be Added
nodes.description: PO details can be added at any time from Sent onwards.

nodes.label: Trigger RAMS
nodes.description: Next operational step after Sent.

nodes.label: Accepted
nodes.description: Display label for the underlying po_received status.

nodes.label: Schedule / Start Job
nodes.description: Start date and alerts are set.

nodes.label: In Progress
nodes.description: Job has started.

nodes.label: Completed In Full
nodes.description: Job completed in full.

nodes.label: Completed In Part
nodes.description: Job completed in part.

nodes.label: Partially Invoiced
nodes.description: Some value has been invoiced, but balance remains.

nodes.label: Invoiced
nodes.description: Full value has been invoiced.

nodes.label: Latest Version
nodes.description: The only version that can be edited, invoiced, receive attachments, or be deleted if still draft.

nodes.label: Create New Version
nodes.description: Creates a new draft version in the same quote thread.

nodes.label: New Latest Draft Version
nodes.description: Becomes the active working version in the same thread.

nodes.label: Historical Versions
nodes.description: Older versions remain visible in the thread and timeline, but become read-only.

nodes.label: Duplicate as New Quote
nodes.description: Creates a new independent quote thread starting again at Draft.

nodes.label: Separate Quote Thread
nodes.description: Independent quote, not part of the original version chain.

nodes.label: Latest Version Only
nodes.description: Only the latest version can be edited, invoiced, uploaded to, or have attachments removed.

nodes.label: Delete Rule
nodes.description: Only the latest draft version can be deleted. If it is deleted, the previous version becomes latest again.

nodes.label: Invoice Limit
nodes.description: Invoice amount cannot exceed the remaining balance. If value has increased, create a new version first.

nodes.label: Version Visibility
nodes.description: Older versions remain visible in the Versions list and expandable table rows for history.

nodes.label: Commercial Closed Is Separate
nodes.description: Commercial open/closed is an orthogonal flag and does not replace the main workflow status.

legend.meaning: How revisions and duplicate quotes behave
Important constraints enforced by the system

gemini_prompt_suggestion: Generate a polished client-ready workflow diagram from this JSON. Use a clean multi-lane left-to-right layout. Keep the main quote lifecycle as the primary lane, the approval loop as a compact secondary loop, the version workflow as a clearly separated parallel lane, and the rules as side callouts. Make sure Sent and Accepted are shown as distinct stages. Make sure the version workflow clearly explains latest version, historical versions, create new version, duplicate as new quote, and delete/latest-only rules. Use concise labels and readable arrows.
source_of_truth_notes: Approved and Sent moves the quote to Sent.
Trigger RAMS is the next major operational step after Sent.
Accepted is the display label used for the po_received status.
PO details can be added from Sent onwards.
Only the latest version can be edited, invoiced, or modified.
Historical versions remain visible but read-only.
Deleting is only allowed for the latest draft version.
A duplicate creates a separate quote thread, not a new version inside the same thread.
